---
name: Skill Submission
about: Submit a new community skill for FoneClaw
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: skill
---

**Skill name**

The directory name for your skill (lowercase, hyphens).

**What does this skill do?**

A 1-2 sentence summary.

**Tools used**

List the tool names your skill calls (e.g., `mail_list`, `wifi_status`).

**Tested on**

- FoneClaw version:
- Android version:
- Device:

**Checklist**

- [ ] Directory name is lowercase with hyphens
- [ ] YAML front matter is valid (name, description, version)
- [ ] Scope section defines when to use and NOT to use
- [ ] Workflows are step-by-step with real tool references
- [ ] No sensitive data included
